creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

- It compiles fine for me and The pointyhat cluster didn't report problems with  
firebird21-server port. You can found firebird21-server package at: 

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-8-packages-latest/databases/firebird-server-2.1.3.tbz 

btw, I compiled firebird23-server port on FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE amd64
